# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM alpine:latest as base
RUN apk --no-cache add openssl curl ca-certificates

FROM alpine:latest as webserver
BASE /app
COPY --from=base /usr/local/ssl /etc/ssl
WORKDIR /app
EXPOSE 80

FROM alpine:latest as api_server
COPY --from=base /usr/local/ssl /etc/ssl
WORKDIR /app
RUN apk --no-cache add nodejs npm postgresql libpq
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["npm", "start"]

FROM alpine:latest as db
RUN apk --no-cache add postgresql
EXPOSE 5432
CMD ["pg_createcluster", "--start", "mydb"]

FROM redis:alpine
EXPOSE 6379
CMD ["redis-server"]

FROM alpine:latest as builder
COPY . /app
WORKDIR /app
RUN apk --no-cache add openssl curl ca-certificates \
    && npm install \
    && npm run build

FROM base
COPY --from=builder /app/dist /usr/local/www
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
